title: hortensia × amagiana
intro: Hortensia × amagiana, also known as a sterile hybrid of Hydrangea, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Hydrangeaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Hortensia × amagiana include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Hortensia × amagiana can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to treat various ailments.
